title: urtica alienata
intro: Urtica alienata, also known as the annual nettle or annual burn nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family Urticaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The medicinal properties of Urtica alienata are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Urtica alienata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical cream, and has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including eczema, psoriasis, and wounds.
